blocks.text: Mark Villegas, with Jason Torres copied:

Thank you for the finance extracts your team sent last week. They are loaded, and they reconcile cleanly against the figures we pulled from the published sources for {{fact:f:E-2012-001.client}}. The market sizing is taking shape, and Deborah Gordon has the synthesis frame far enough along that findings will have somewhere to land as they come in.

A couple of things from our side would help us keep to schedule. We are still missing the regional sales breakdown by segment for the last full year; the summary you sent is close, but the segment cut is what lets us separate the market you are weighing from the one you already serve. Separately, the customer interviews we discussed will need a name and an introduction from someone at Garcia-Werner, since a cold approach in this market rarely earns a straight answer.

Jason Torres will be in your offices for the site visit we set, and I will send the interview times as soon as the contact is in hand. If the segment breakdown is easier to pull in a rougher form, send that and we will work from it instead of waiting on a clean file. Nothing further is needed from you today.
